requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — NBSM Conformity Assessment and IEC 62619 as International Baseline for Nepal BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——NBSM合格评定及IEC 62619作为尼泊尔BESS项目验收的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——NBSM合格評定及IEC 62619作為尼泊爾BESS項目驗收的國際基準

summary.en: NBSM (Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology) is the national standards body and conformity assessment authority for Nepal, established under the Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology Act. NBSM adopts IEC standards for electrical and electrochemical products and administers import conformity assessment for regulated product categories. A confirmed mandatory NBSM Technical Standard or regulated-product designation specifically for BESS cells, modules, or systems had not been publicly identified as of the dataset date — exporters should verify the current NBSM regulated-product list before shipment. However, IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules and is the standard expected by Nepal project owners, NEA, and international financing institutions (ADB, World Bank bilateral programs) in project technical specifications and loan covenants. IEC 62133 (Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries) may also be referenced for smaller BESS or off-grid applications. IEC 62933-5-2 is expected at system level for utility-scale and C&I BESS projects.
summary.zh: NBSM（尼泊尔标准与计量局）是尼泊尔全国标准机构和合格评定主管机关，依据《尼泊尔标准与计量局法》设立。NBSM对电气和电化学产品采用IEC标准，并对受监管产品类别实施进口合格评定。截至本数据集日期，尚未公开确认NBSM专门针对BESS电芯、模组或系统的强制性技术标准或受监管产品认定——出口商在出货前应核实现行NBSM受监管产品清单。然而，IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准，也是尼泊尔项目业主、NEA及国际融资机构（亚行、世行双边项目）在项目技术规格和贷款条款中所预期的标准。IEC 62133（便携式密封二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）也可能在较小型BESS或离网应用中被引用。IEC 62933-5-2在公用事业规模和工商业BESS项目的系统级应用中被预期引用。
summary.zht: NBSM（尼泊爾標準與計量局）是尼泊爾全國標準機構和合格評定主管機關，依據《尼泊爾標準與計量局法》設立。NBSM對電氣和電化學產品採用IEC標準，並對受監管產品類別實施進口合格評定。截至本數據集日期，尚未公開確認NBSM專門針對BESS電芯、模組或系統的強制性技術標準或受監管產品認定——出口商在出貨前應核實現行NBSM受監管產品清單。然而，IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準，也是尼泊爾項目業主、NEA及國際融資機構（亞行、世行雙邊項目）在項目技術規格和貸款條款中所預期的標準。IEC 62133（便攜式密封二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）也可能在較小型BESS或離網應用中被引用。IEC 62933-5-2在公用事業規模和工商業BESS項目的系統級應用中被預期引用。

standards_or_laws: NBSM (Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology) — national standards and conformity assessment authority; adopts IEC standards; verify current regulated-product list for BESS directly at nbsm.gov.np before shipment

IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Nepal project specifications)
IEC 62133 — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries (may apply to smaller BESS or off-grid applications)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications and NEA review)
AEPC (Alternative Energy Promotion Centre) — technical standards for subsidised off-grid and mini-grid BESS programs; verify at aepc.gov.np

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not adopted by NBSM and are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in Nepal project specifications, NEA technical review, AEPC program requirements, or international lender conditions. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准未被NBSM采纳，不被接受为IEC 62619在尼泊尔项目规格、NEA技术审查、AEPC项目要求或国际贷款方条件中的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证书。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準未被NBSM採納，不被接受為IEC 62619在尼泊爾項目規格、NEA技術審查、AEPC項目要求或國際貸款方條件中的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: Nepal project owners, NEA, AEPC program specifications, and international financing institutions reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in Nepal project technical specifications. NBSM adopts IEC standards for conformity assessment — Chinese GB certificates are not a valid substitute for NBSM conformity assessment purposes. Exporters should: (a) verify the current NBSM regulated-product list for any mandatory pre-shipment conformity obligation for BESS; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Nepal BESS projects; (c) for AEPC-subsidised off-grid or mini-grid programs, verify AEPC's specific technical standards and equipment approval requirements at aepc.gov.np; (d) confirm IEC 62133 applicability for smaller off-grid BESS configurations if referenced in the AEPC program specification; (e) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition and system-level IEC 62933-5-2 evidence requirements with the project owner, NEA, and any appointed lender's technical advisor before committing to a test programme.
gap.zh: 关键差距：尼泊尔项目业主、NEA、AEPC项目规格和国际融资机构将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被尼泊尔项目技术规格接受为替代依据。NBSM采用IEC标准进行合格评定——中国GB证书不是有效的NBSM合格评定替代依据。出口商应：（a）核实现行NBSM受监管产品清单，确认BESS是否存在强制装运前合规义务；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至尼泊尔BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）对于AEPC补贴离网或微电网项目，在aepc.gov.np核实AEPC的具体技术标准和设备审批要求；（d）若AEPC项目规格中有引用，确认IEC 62133是否适用于较小型离网BESS配置；（e）在启动测试计划前，向项目业主、NEA及任何贷款方技术顾问确认适用的IEC 62619版本及系统级IEC 62933-5-2证据要求。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：尼泊爾項目業主、NEA、AEPC項目規格和國際融資機構將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被尼泊爾項目技術規格接受為替代依據。NBSM採用IEC標準進行合格評定——中國GB證書不是有效的NBSM合格評定替代依據。出口商應：（a）核實現行NBSM受監管產品清單，確認BESS是否存在強制裝運前合規義務；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至尼泊爾BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）對於AEPC補貼離網或微電網項目，在aepc.gov.np核實AEPC的具體技術標準和設備審批要求；（d）若AEPC項目規格中有引用，確認IEC 62133是否適用於較小型離網BESS配置；（e）在啟動測試計劃前，向項目業主、NEA及任何貸款方技術顧問確認適用的IEC 62619版本及系統級IEC 62933-5-2證據要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where NEA, AEPC, or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; NBSM mandatory regulatory obligation for BESS has not been confirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with NBSM at nbsm.gov.np
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

source.publisher: NBSM (Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation under NBSM has been identified as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Nepal project specifications, NEA requirements, AEPC programs, and international lender conditions. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Nepal project acceptance. Verify NBSM current regulated-product scope at nbsm.gov.np, AEPC technical standards at aepc.gov.np, and confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner, NEA, and any lender technical advisor before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，尚未确认NBSM针对BESS的独立强制性产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619是尼泊尔项目规格、NEA要求、AEPC项目和国际贷款方条件中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足尼泊尔项目验收要求。出货前请在nbsm.gov.np核实NBSM现行受监管产品范围，在aepc.gov.np核实AEPC技术标准，并向项目业主、NEA及任何贷款方技术顾问确认IEC 62619证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，尚未確認NBSM針對BESS的獨立強制性產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619是尼泊爾項目規格、NEA要求、AEPC項目和國際貸款方條件中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足尼泊爾項目驗收要求。出貨前請在nbsm.gov.np核實NBSM現行受監管產品範圍，在aepc.gov.np核實AEPC技術標準，並向項目業主、NEA及任何貸款方技術顧問確認IEC 62619證據要求。
